codeList:
$ sudo apt install --no-install-recommends nvidia-headless-545 nvidia-utils-545
$ modinfo nvidia | grep "^version"
version:        545.29.06
$ minikube start
$ kubectl cluster-info
  $ kubectl describe node <gpu-worker-node>

  Capacity:
  ...
  nvidia.com/gpu:     4
  ...
  Allocatable:
  ...
  nvidia.com/gpu:     4
  ...
  ```
